meta.description: Structured inventory of all catalogued features across EcomCine plugin groups. Used for migration planning, adapter progress tracking, and quick overview.

features.title: Attribute schema and storage tables
features.business_objective: Category-scoped attribute schema registry with CRUD for attribute sets and fields; vendor attribute value storage.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same fields returned per vendor category; same value roundtrip for all field types; same schema after export/import.

features.title: Vendor dashboard dynamic field rendering
features.business_objective: Inject category-appropriate attribute form fields into Dokan vendor dashboard with real-time show/hide per category.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same field set per category; same validation; same user meta state after save.

features.title: Storefront vendor profile attribute display
features.business_objective: Render vendor attribute values publicly on store profile page filtered by category membership and public visibility flag.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same sets shown per category; empty fields suppressed; values match stored meta.

features.title: Store listing filters by attributes
features.business_objective: Render attribute filter controls on store listing and apply them via meta_query to produce filtered vendor results.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same filter controls per category; same vendor result set for equivalent filter combinations.

features.title: Vendor playlist extraction from biography shortcodes
features.business_objective: Build normalized media playlist payload from vendor biography shortcodes and banner meta for media player UI.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same items (count, types, metadata) for identical biography; same fallback for equivalent banner state.

features.title: Fallback media strategy (banner video / banner image)
features.business_objective: Resolve ordered fallback chain for vendor banner video and image when full playlist is unavailable.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same fallbackImage and fallbackVideo URLs for equivalent vendor banner state; '' when not configured.

features.title: REST endpoint for vendor store content payload
features.business_objective: Expose REST endpoint returning complete media player payload for a vendor, enabling AJAX store navigation.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same playlist payload for valid vendor; 404 for non-existent; 400 for invalid ID.

features.title: AJAX navigation list and store content loaders
features.business_objective: Enable smooth in-page AJAX navigation between vendor store pages without full page reloads.
features.parity_oracle_short: Vendor content loads without full reload; player re-initializes; back button restores prior vendor.

features.title: Store-page account panel shell and modal UX
features.business_objective: Render right-side account panel tab with login/register modal on eligible vendor store and listing pages.
features.parity_oracle_short: Panel visible on same page types; modal opens/closes correctly; auth state transitions visible.

features.title: AJAX login and session bootstrap
features.business_objective: Authenticate user via AJAX front-end request and establish WP session without page reload.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same login success/failure outcomes; correct cookie; nonce rejection before auth attempt.

features.title: Admin-assisted talent onboarding and claim/share flows
features.business_objective: Enable admin to onboard talent users via invitation tokens with lifecycle transitions and role assignment.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same lifecycle transitions per admin action; same token validation; same role assignment on claim.

features.title: Vendor account management panel (orders, bookings, IP)
features.business_objective: Present logged-in vendor with contextualized account dashboard of orders, bookings, and IP assets.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same section data for equivalent WC order/booking state; empty sections handled gracefully.

features.title: Vendor store booking product discovery (half-day category)
features.business_objective: Discover vendor's featured WooCommerce Bookings product (half-day category) for modal booking flow.
features.parity_oracle_short: Non-zero ID returned for vendors with half-day booking product; 0 for vendors without.

features.title: Modal booking form rendering and booking asset loading
features.business_objective: Load WC Bookings product form inside vendor store modal with date picker and availability.
features.parity_oracle_short: Form renders with date picker; unavailable dates shown; required fields validated.

features.title: Add-to-cart and checkout modal actions
features.business_objective: Complete frictionless booking checkout in vendor store modal from add-to-cart through order placement.
features.parity_oracle_short: Booking confirmed with order ID; billing validation enforced; payment captured; modal-origin meta set.

features.title: Checkout field, privacy and terms customization filters
features.business_objective: Simplify WC modal checkout to required fields only; apply domain-specific privacy/terms and modal origin flag.
features.parity_oracle_short: Only required billing fields shown; domain privacy text rendered; modal-origin meta on order.

features.title: Store/listing template override orchestration
features.business_objective: Override Dokan store/listing templates with cinematic theme equivalents controlling layout and section composition.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same section composition and layout mode; custom template overrides Dokan default; hooks still fire.

features.title: Asset governance for vendor pages
features.business_objective: Dequeue unwanted Dokan/WC/third-party assets on vendor pages; enqueue only cinematic theme assets.
features.parity_oracle_short: Dokan CSS absent; no visual regression; WC checkout handles retained for tvbm; no JS errors.

features.title: Vendor profile meta synchronization and custom fields
features.business_objective: Maintain extended vendor profile meta (headline, social links, skills) and sync between save and render contexts.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same meta values after save; same completeness score; same social links per meta state.

features.title: Product/store vendor identity presentation hooks
features.business_objective: Inject vendor name, avatar, and store link into WC product cards and Dokan store listing cards.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same identity data (name, avatar, URL) per vendor; block present in product/listing loops.

features.title: Social metrics, vendor completeness, and map modules
features.business_objective: Standalone include-level modules for social platform links, profile completeness score, and conditional map embed.
features.parity_oracle_short: Same social links and completeness score per meta state; map shown/hidden per location meta + feature flag.

features.title: No Scroll Grid auto-fit mode for person listing
features.business_objective: Provide optional no-scroll viewport-fit mode for person listing grid while preserving 16:9 cards and pagination navigation.
features.parity_oracle_short: With no-scroll enabled, configured rows/columns and pagination fit viewport with no page scroll while preserving 16:9 cards.
